eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Grays Harbor; Pacific, WA; at 10:14 AM ON MAY 7, 2026 Effective until 03:29 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the Pacific County Emergency Management Agency with a required monthly test of the Emergency Alert System. If this were to have been an actual Emergency you would have been instructed where to tune for official news and instructions.
